hero.subtitle: A recipe loved across every continent. Now on-chain, with a 1,000-year community testing it. Fair launch. No presale. No VC.

story.intro: Plov didn't belong to one place. It appeared, independently, wherever fire met grain and meat met spice. A universal recipe written not by one chef, but by humanity itself.

milestones.title: The First Pot
milestones.text: Rice meets fire in clay vessels. The recipe is born — different in every village, the same at heart.

milestones.title: The Spread
milestones.text: Trade routes carry the recipe across continents. Saffron, lamb, dried fruit, chicken, vegetables. Each version honest.

milestones.title: UNESCO Heritage
milestones.text: Recognized as humanity's intangible cultural heritage — not because one place owns it, but because everyone does. A communal recipe scaled across cultures.

milestones.title: On-Chain
milestones.text: A recipe that survived 1,000 years of distributed consensus moves to Solana. Same philosophy, new technology. Open source, community-owned, immutable.

manifesto.intro: Most memecoins are jokes told once. We're building something that already passed the test — a cultural artifact that survived for centuries because it actually works.

items.title: Culture First
items.body: Most tokens borrow a cute mascot and call it a day. We're rooted in something older — a recipe that connects strangers across continents. Real story, real heritage, real meaning.
items.quote: If your meme needs explaining, it isn't one yet.

items.title: Fair Launch
items.body: No presale. No private round. No insider allocations. No VCs at a discount. Everyone gets the same shot, at the same price, at the same time. The token launches the way a community potluck starts — open to all who show up.
items.quote: Same fire, same kazan, same chance.

items.title: Community Owned
items.body: 45% of supply goes to airdrops over four waves. Just 8% for the team, fully vested. Mint authority disabled forever. Liquidity locked. The chef sets the table, the community feasts together.
items.quote: The one who cooks it shouldn't own it. The belongs to those who eat.

tokenomics.intro: Every ingredient in its place. 45% goes to the community through PlovDrop — the largest allocation. No presale, no private sale, no VC rounds.
tokenomics.largestBody: PlovDrop across four waves — more than Liquidity, Marketing, and Team combined.

roadmap.intro: Every dish has phases. Ingredients, preparation, fire, serving. Same with $PLOV — a deliberate sequence, not a hype pump.

phases.name: Phase 0
phases.subtitle: Foundation
items: Token deployed on Solana (mint & freeze disabled)

security.intro: Every treasury operation is on-chain, multi-signed, and published. No hidden wallets. No secret allocations. Everything verifiable on Solana.

cards.title: Squads Multisig
cards.body: All treasury operations require multi-signature approval with timelock. No single signer can move funds. 4 hardware wallets, 3 signers required.

cards.title: Proof-Hub
cards.body: Every action is on-chain and published with transaction hashes, addresses, and timestamps. No private allocations. Everything verifiable on Solana.

cards.title: Security Review
cards.body: Independent security review process initiated with external auditors. Results will be published on Proof-Hub when finalized. We do not claim any audit completion until officially confirmed.

security.bannerRest: Engagement with external auditors is underway. Results will be published on
security.bannerTail: when finalized. We do not claim any audit completion until officially confirmed by the auditor.

community.intro: Every plov is shared. Ours is no different. Whichever channel you're on, we're there.

footer.antiPhishText: Official URLs only — plovcoin.com and claim.plovcoin.com. Never enter your seed phrase. We will never DM you first.
footer.briefDesc: Fair launch memecoin on Solana. 45% to community. Mint=OFF. No presale, no VC.
footer.riskText: $PLOV is a memecoin with no inherent utility or expectation of profit. Cryptocurrency investments are highly volatile and may result in total loss of capital. Nothing on this site constitutes financial, legal, or investment advice. Not available in restricted jurisdictions. Do your own research. Past performance does not indicate future results. Compliance with local laws is the sole responsibility of the participant.

proof.intro: Every action on-chain. Every address public. Every transaction verifiable. No private wallets. No hidden allocations.
proof.placeholderNote: Data will be published progressively as TGE approaches (June 2026). Bookmark this page — every operation will appear here within 24 hours.
proof.verifyText: Once published, every address and transaction here links directly to Solscan. You don't need to trust us — verify on-chain.

whitepaper.intro: Full technical and economic specification. Read it. Question it. Verify it.

sections.desc: What $PLOV is, why it exists, what it isn't.

sections.desc: Why a universal recipe is the right base for a memecoin.

plovdrop.intro: The largest allocation goes to the people. Four waves over 12 months. No insiders, no whitelists, no pay-to-play.
plovdrop.phishText: claim.plovcoin.com — opens at TGE. Any other URL is a phishing attempt. We will never DM you.

waves.target: Holders + active community + verified social engagement

plovdrop.ctaText: Join the community now. Wave 1 eligibility starts with #PlovChallenge participation and verified social engagement.

meta.homeDesc: PlovCoin is the first universal cultural memecoin on Solana. Billions have tasted it. Now they can own it. Fair launch, 45% to community, no presale, no VC.
meta.proofDesc: Verify every PlovCoin operation on-chain. Addresses, liquidity, airdrops, burns, vesting, advertising, security, incidents — all public, all verifiable on Solana.
meta.whitepaperDesc: PlovCoin Whitepaper v7.3 — full technical and economic specification. Tokenomics, liquidity strategy, security architecture, roadmap.
meta.plovdropDesc: PlovDrop is the largest allocation in $PLOV — 45% of supply distributed across four airdrop waves to the community.
